notes:
### v1.3.2

#### Fixed
- Marketplace item labels are cleaner. Engraving rows now show only the engraving name, and accessory rows no longer repeat long generated necklace, earring, or ring names.
- Dashboard label popups stay inside the app window. Dashboard label popups are now centered so they no longer glitch or render partly outside the app on narrower window sizes.
- Mixed raid difficulty tooltips are clearer. Dashboard and To Do raid tooltips now correctly explain planned versus cleared difficulty when a raid was completed in mixed mode.

#### Improved
- Marketplace now has better gem and accessory support. Gem and accessory estimate rows now use bundled icons, clearer names, slot filters, and DPS/Support accessory filters.
- Accessory estimates are easier to read. Accessory rows now show compact colored stat values by roll grade, with support-specific values for Brand Power, Identity Gain, Ally Attack Power, Ally Damage, and Weapon Power estimates.
- Dashboard and To Do details are clearer. Dashboard label popups and To Do raid tooltips better explain available characters, additional non-gold raids, and planned versus cleared raid difficulties.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.3.2_x64-setup.exe` below.
